---
title: "Output PNG"
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
source("R/config.R")
source("R/utils.R")
source("R/data_loader.R")
source("R/analysis.R")
source("R/visualization.R")
config <- get_config()
```

```{r generate, include=FALSE}
generate_all_images(config)
```
